message:
dispatch: add schema-registry dispatch path for FT-P2C-003 (bd-3kgy)

Summary:
- Added  and  in  to register parsed op schema inputs against validated dispatch keysets.
- Added  to execute scalar dispatch by normalized schema name through the registry.
- Added fail-closed schema-registry errors for duplicate/missing/unsupported schema entries.
- Extended  unit coverage for registry registration, duplicate/unsupported rejection, and schema-based dispatch.
- Extended  op-schema fixture contract with  and added registry-backed dispatch probing in both per-case runner and differential checks.
- Added op-schema forensic fields for observed/expected kernel traces.

Validation:
- rch exec -- cargo fmt --check
- rch exec -- cargo test -p ft-dispatch -- --nocapture
- rch exec -- cargo test -p ft-conformance strict_op_schema_conformance_is_green -- --nocapture
- rch exec -- cargo test -p ft-conformance differential_op_schema_adds_metamorphic_and_adversarial_checks -- --nocapture
- rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets
- rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
- ubs --only=rust crates/ft-dispatch
- ubs --only=rust crates/ft-conformance

Traceability:
- Bead: bd-3kgy
- Packet: FT-P2C-003

files.patch:
@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@
       "schema_input": "add.Tensor(Tensor self, Tensor other, *, Scalar alpha=1) -> Tensor",
       "name_input": "add.Tensor",
       "dispatch_tags": ["CPU", "AutogradCPU"],
+      "expected_kernel": "autograd_cpu::add_scalar",
       "expect_parse_ok": true,
       "expect_schema_variant": true,
       "expect_out_variant": false,
@@ -16,6 +17,7 @@
       "schema_input": "aten::add.Tensor(Tensor self, Tensor other, *, Scalar alpha=1) -> Tensor",
       "name_input": "add.Tensor",
       "dispatch_tags": ["CPU", "AutogradCPU"],
+      "expected_kernel": "autograd_cpu::add_scalar",
       "expect_parse_ok": true,
       "expect_schema_variant": true,
       "expect_out_variant": false,
@@ -27,6 +29,7 @@
       "schema_input": "add.out(Tensor self, Tensor other, *, Scalar alpha=1, Tensor(a!) out) -> Tensor(a!)",
       "name_input": "add.out",
       "dispatch_tags": ["CPU", "AutogradCPU"],
+      "expected_kernel": "autograd_cpu::add_scalar",
       "expect_parse_ok": true,
       "expect_schema_variant": true,
       "expect_out_variant": true,
